8203c765510a8eaefc4cec10a240fab2.title: IIT Roorkee Opens Admissions for the 11th Batch of its Post Graduate Certificate in Data Science, Machine Learning & Generative AI
8203c765510a8eaefc4cec10a240fab2.desc: Roorkee (Uttarakhand) [India], June 9: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee has opened admissions for the 11th batch of its Post Graduate Certificate in Data Science, Machine Learning & Generative AI, an advanced professional programme created for learners seeking a rigorous and application-led understanding of artificial intelligence and data-led technologies. The curriculum brings together the foundations of data science, machine learning, deep learning, Generative AI and MLOps, enabling participants to develop the capabilities required to design, build and deploy intelligent solutions in contemporary business environments.

c8914367c1990224eba0c6d76ff7b446.desc: An IIT graduate is struggling to find a job in software development, AI, machine learning, and data science. ee45588cc77d5dd9d10c15b13c648df6.title: India's Regulated Organizations Now Have a Native Answer to the Database Visibility Crisis
ee45588cc77d5dd9d10c15b13c648df6.desc: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], May 30: ESDS Software Solution Limited, India's sovereign cloud and data centre provider, today announced the availability of Enlight Jatayoo, a Database Activity Monitoring (DAM) platform purpose-built for India's regulated industries. The platform addresses a critical and largely unresolved gap in enterprise data security: the absence of continuous, forensic-grade visibility at the database layer the final frontier where an organisation's most sensitive data resides.
